item.title: He said the quiet part out loud
item.description: Enforcing ethics would purge Republicans. Republicans stay in power because they hold themselves to zero principles/standards. Republicans would lose the President, VP, Attorney General, FBI, entire Cabinet, and six SCOTUS justices. Just for starters. Republicans know pedophiles are in power and will scorch the Earth to keep them in power. Shutting down the House for almost two months is proof of their cover up. Republican policies need disgusting men.
item.dc:creator: IliveINyourHEADrentFREE

item.title: Is your PC running slow? Try this:
item.dc:creator: ewakemanVA

item.title: 4 new Pucketts
item.description:
Hi everyone, that's me! My life looks a whole lot different all of a sudden.
Some of you know my 2 dogs MrsPuckett and Puckett Jr But I wanted to introduce you to 4 new Pucketts
If you follow me on social or saw my Xmas selfie, you might've noticed I fell in love in Minnesota
This month me and my 2 dogs moved in with her and her 4 dogs SIX DOGS. ONE HOUSE. LETS GOOOOOOO
Everyone - meet Kevin. He's 14 and doesn't have any teeth so his tongue hangs out 24/7 She adopted him at 9 years old and he's the weirdest dog I've ever met
He's even smaller than Puckett Jr! Kevin wants to cuddle all day long and do nothing else, he's a sweet boy
Waldo is a big 9 year old sheepadoodle that she took in last year. He's super high anxiety but doing really well on our pack walks
All the anxious dogs love MrsPuckett
Louise is 13 and she's more timid than anxious She always leans on Puckett for strength too
It took Louise the longest to love me but we eventually got there through exercise
Hank is a 13 year old spaniel that tore his ACL and had surgery Poor guy can't do much besides short slow walks and napping -
But the guy does love a good nap
You might think having 6 dogs would be insane, but its actually been really lovely All the dogs get along great, hers are all old and mine still run 45 miles a week Home is just where we all relax together.
Waking up every day to the woman I love and 6 dogs who love us back I honestly didn't know happiness could feel like this.
My dogs are loving all the new running routes She lives 15 miles from where I was so every morning my dogs get to see a brand new place
It's also been super fun bringing her dogs along for adventures if she's stuck at work And anytime I leave the house, my dogs still get a human to love!
Kevin isn't much for adventures though ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
I think back now to when MrPuckett died, how alone i felt How I wondered if I'd ever have anything in my life worth fighting for again
And while it took some time, some work, and plenty more hardship I finally found it - 6 dogs and one amazing woman who's always there for me.
So as much as I wanted to make this post to show off the new dogs, I also wanted to say There is a light at the end of the tunnel. It might take you 39 years it might take you 39 days But the only way to find it is to keep fighting. ... If you need food or would like send someone food today, stop by TheFreePizzaDude post and say hello Let's send food to Imgurians in need https://imgur.com/gallery/fbmfc7z
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: Y'all, I can finally fit into my old blue jeans from high school!
item.description:
I graduated before some of y'all were born and back when "low rise" jeans were in style.
They don't quite fit the same due to loose skin and ya know, being 20 years older, but still.
A screenshot of a "before" video I took after already losing 25lbs. I hated taking full body pictures of myself, but looking back I wish I did take more. I've come so fucking far, and I still have so fucking far to go. But I am so goddamn proud of myself and so thankful for all the support I've had on imgur. Whether it's motivational comments, workout music, or fucked up memes, y'all have kept me going. I'm down to 195lbs from 285lbs back in January 2025 Please send slutty music to work out to, an inappropriate memes, or high protein low carb recipes to try. Marked M for Mature cause fat rolls and titties. Love y'all
item.dc:creator: Sugarbritches21

item.title: Just a reminder to the folks looking for a hangout like Old Imgur:
item.description: I'm not leaving, but many oldheads are after Medialab fired the last of Imgur's employees. That said, to those of you thinking about heading out, consider popping onto our community Discord, The Stable, to say hi and hang out with former and current Imgurians: https://discord.gg/jointhestable I made the server back in the old times, and it's about the closest thing to Old Imgur as we've been able to make for ourselves. We've about 4000 or so Imgur refugees and counting, and even if my brand of pony humor isn't your bag, you're all still welcome to come on in. Our rules are simple, we have little to no drama, and it's just a nice hangout where we share memes, chat about our lives, and tell bad jokes. Politics and current events are quarantined in a section that is opt-in, rather than opt-out, so if you don't want to stress about the news you can simply not take the role that unlocks that area. Plus, we don't have a dozen bored moderators looking for reasons to punish. It's just me and Fafa, and we're pretty good at this. :) Anyhow, our doors are open. Y'all are welcome to say hello anytime. <3
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAHorse

item.title: 20 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol. 78
item.description: This was Lawrence Anthony. He gave a herd of elephants their last chance at life by letting them live on his property when they had nowhere else to go. When he died, the herd showed up to mourn for two days. They come back each year on the anniversary too.
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.dc:creator: LariCheltsy

item.title: MFW all my friends get laid off by a shitty holding company of consumer internet brands
item.description: This is a post I'd hoped that I'd never have to make. After 10 years of being part of this community, I have decided to bring my time here to an end. Over the past several years, I've made good friends with many of the staff members and other community folks, who were all let go without warning on Monday. They were the backbone of this community, and their dedication and care were unparalleled. Without them, I fear that this place will decline sharply. I want to emphasize that this decision was not taken lightly, and I am deeply saddened by the sudden and unexpected departure. I will always treasure my time here, from the endless pings to approve an otter post, to raising money for charity during Extra Life, to the weddings and the wonderful gifts I've been given, I'm very grateful for it all. I'm AgentOtter, wishing you an otterly wonderful life.
item.dc:creator: AgentOtter

item.title: It’s Felix Friday!!!
item.description:
After a hard day at work with his Dad, Felix is still ready to play toys if you’ll throw it to him!
Meera always lurking around. Fe is getting gray hairs!
Baby Girl is struggling through a Cushings related kidney infection right now. We just started meds yesterday so hopefully she recovers soon.
The Mayor of Shrewville (see following picture) brought in a little friend through the dog door and I feel like it got away from her. As she waits patiently for its return. I am grossed out.
Walkies with Sammy and Meera!
And finally, the Mayor of Shrewville lords over her constituents as they reproduce like crazy in the garden and shed next door. Stay afraid, my fellow shrews. Stay afraid. We love you guys! Have a great weekend!
item.dc:creator: thevaiobandit101

I uploaded it from my car while waiting to pick up my buddy to go to a concert and I guess the connection wasn’t great, which caused things to go sideways during the upload. I included the problem submissions at the end. Hope you all have a great weekend!
item.dc:creator: UncleSlam123

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
TheFreePizzaDude is back ＼⁠(⁠°⁠o⁠°⁠)⁠／ If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
This has been such a huge help for us to feed more people and we love you so much https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 8pm central
The Pucketts are here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
15,688 meals since we started 1,134 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 230 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 330 5th by Pizza Angel @RightfulSin 335 6th, 7th, 8th and 9th by @OP 415 10th by Pizza Angel @Heyyzthisguy 11th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 12th, 13th, 14th and 15th by @OP 16th by Pizza Angel @irvingschwinglepuck 17th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 18th by Pizza Angel @Afeistybeastie 19th and 20th by Pizza Angel @Braingaius 21st, 22nd, Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant by @OP ... Today's Grocery Tally 330 1st by Grocery Angel @TheCraicen 530 2nd by Grocery Angel @TheCraicen 645 3rd by Grocery Angel @sesamesnapsinhalf 740 4th by Grocery Angel @Braingaius ... Alright everyone that's it for OP Today we send out 24 meals Filled 4 huge grocery orders That's 15,712 meals since we started 1,138 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Impeachment Protest - Cliff Cash
item.description: Protest where they are. NOT in parks or sidewalks. This is what our Monday mornings look like. It takes a little over four hours to visit all 435 offices. FLARE is there to advocate for impeachment and removal, but also to push back on the latest atrocities committed by the 47th regime. Our strategy is straightforward. We're set up at a 24/7 camp in front of Union Station so we can apply loud, sustained pressure on the three primary entities terrorizing Americans: ? Congress: the only body with the power to remove the 47th regime. ? The Heritage Foundation: the authors of Project 2025. and ? Fox News: the propaganda machine working 24/7 to spread disinformation and normalize fascism. We work with organizations like Cliff Cash's We Are The Flood and Jessica Denson's Removal Coalition. Join the movement. FuelTheFLARE https://flareusa.cargo.site/ #WeAreTheFlood #RemovalCoalition #FLARE247DC
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: Imgur chooses not to explain.
item.description: Yesterday, amid all the buzz of the South Park episode, I downloaded one of the videos from Viral, and trimmed it down to just the deepfake section, which was posted in it's entirety right here on Imgur. However, my post was instantly removed, and I was given a warning. I assumed that it must be because I used Penis in the title while not marking the post Mature, so I posted again, more correctly, this time. No mention of Penis, and marked Mature. The post was instantly removed and I was given a 24hr ban. In talking with Imgur Support, they continue to say I posted inappropriate content, but fail to explain why my shortened post was removed while the longer fuller version was already on Viral. Imgur has always sucked when it comes to explaining their choices, and I never expect to get a straight answer from Support. They just keep copying and pasting the same damn thing. Fuck you, Imgur. I do not approve of your goddamn secret police rounding us up with no given reason. I want clarity. This site sucks and I don't know why I stick around anymore.
item.dc:creator: Onlyhereforthelaughs

item.title: I wish positive statements impacted us as much as negative ones do.
item.description: I mean there was way more than that, you’re not made for university, don’t ever become a teacher or you will kill yourself, you can only date fat people because you’re fat. Stop going for guys that are out of your league. You’re the most judgemental person I’ve ever met, you’re not my daughter, you’re too loud etc etc. Last nights haunting was the basic you look like a sausage take that shirt off and your french sucks.
